tasks.description: Wrote agent/cleanup-cursor-entries.mjs — Node.js script to DELETE the 12 mislabeled provider=cursor rows (session_id LIKE git-%) from Neon ai_interactions; includes safety preview, row count confirmation, and post-delete totals

Removed Cursor from all provider tables. Added cleanup-cursor-entries.mjs to REFERENCE.md troubleshooting table.
